summary.verdict: FAIL: descriptions still grow — LLM ignoring directive

perPosition.name: Corp
perPosition.tableDescription: This table stores unique identifiers and names for corporate entities within the system.

perPosition.name: Division
perPosition.tableDescription: Defines specific business units or segments categorized under a parent corporate entity to organize internal organizational structures.

perPosition.name: Department
perPosition.tableDescription: Represents specific functional groups or operational teams nested within a division to manage localized business activities and personnel.

perPosition.name: Team
perPosition.tableDescription: Defines specific sub-units within a department to organize personnel and tasks for granular operational execution and management.

perPosition.name: Squad
perPosition.tableDescription: Represents the smallest organizational unit, grouping specific individuals under a team to execute specialized tasks or projects.

perPosition.name: Member
perPosition.tableDescription: Stores individual personnel records and maps each person to their specific organizational squad for task execution.

perPosition.name: Task
perPosition.tableDescription: Records specific work assignments and activities assigned to individual personnel for execution within their designated organizational squads.

perPosition.name: Subtask
perPosition.tableDescription: Decomposes primary tasks into smaller, manageable action items to track granular progress and specific requirements within a larger work assignment.

perPosition.name: Step
perPosition.tableDescription: Defines the specific, sequential actions or individual checkpoints required to complete a single subtask within the overall project workflow.

perPosition.name: Action
perPosition.tableDescription: Stores the specific, named execution units or operations performed within a defined workflow step to achieve a discrete outcome.
